/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=15.7 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/RestClientLab3.dir/RestClientLab3_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RestClientLab3.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RestClientLab3.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RestClientLab3.dir/httpclient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RestClientLab3.dir/nerf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RestClientLab3.dir/nerfdialog.cpp.o -o RestClientLab3.app/Contents/MacOS/RestClientLab3 -F/Users/pavelpatokin/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/pavelpatokin/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib /Users/pavelpatokin/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /Users/pavelpatokin/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib/QtNetwork.framework/Versions/A/QtNetwork /Users/pavelpatokin/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /Users/pavelpatokin/Qt/6.11.1/macos/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
